name: x402-radix
description: x402 payment protocol for Radix DLT — AI agents pay with XRD

scripts.build:wasm: cd crates/x402-radix-wasm && cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen --target nodejs --out-dir ../../packages/wasm/dist target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/x402_radix_wasm.wasm
